_comment: Validated primary-source channels. Each entry is live-tested for static feed-ability (requests-scrapeable HTML listing or JSON API). 'pillar' is the CANONICAL dashboard taxonomy (politics | economy | tech | geopolitics | regulatory | society) and is the field the daily digest groups on; the daily-digest DeepSeek pass may reclassify an individual item. 'chapter' is SECONDARY metadata (which china-future-book chapter the channel feeds) kept for that downstream project — it is not used for dashboard grouping. 'mode': scrape | scrape_kw | api_fedreg. 'enc' overrides response decoding (default utf-8) for legacy GB2312 sites. JS-rendered / captcha / blocked channels live under '_needs_browser'.

_needs_browser._comment: Registry channels that are JS-rendered, captcha-walled, anti-bot, or whose static markup yields only nav/boilerplate. They need a headless browser (Kimi WebBridge) — NOT portable to the requests-based collector. Kept here so the exclusion is explicit, not silent. A future tier (provincial governments, think tanks) belongs here until a browser-backed collector exists.
_needs_browser.miit: /xwdt/ embeds the unified gov.cn 要闻 band at the top (Xi/Li boilerplate), not MIIT-specific items; real MIIT content is JS-rendered. Relocated here 2026-06-06 to stop polluting the tech pillar with propaganda.
_needs_browser.mod: mod.gov.cn/gfbw spokesperson page: static scrape surfaces only the CMC org-chart sidebar (军委XX委员会), not the Q&A content.
_needs_browser.customs: customs.gov.cn returns HTTP 412 (precondition/anti-bot) to non-browser clients.
_needs_browser.samr: Own /xw/ list mixes a JS national-news band; static scrape returns gov.cn 要闻 (Xi diplomacy), not SAMR regulatory items.
_needs_browser.spc: court.gov.cn zixun/news pages JS-rendered; static scrape returns footer/sister-site links.
_needs_browser.bis-us: bis.gov press-releases list JS-rendered; static scrape returns 'Skip to main content' nav.
_needs_browser.gov-cn: zhengce/zuixin is a JS template ('+listArrP[i].TITLE+'); no static items.
_needs_browser.peoples-daily: Homepage JS-rendered; static scrape returns nav.
_needs_browser.bis-org: BIS Basel press list JS-rendered; 0 static titles.
_needs_browser.carnegie: research page JS-rendered; static scrape returns nav labels.
_needs_browser.pkulaw: Tencent EdgeOne captcha; logged-in Chrome only.
_needs_browser.courtlistener: v4 REST needs an API token for docket search; root returns metadata only.
